requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — AMANORM Conformity, CREE / EDM-SA Project Requirements, and Donor Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——AMANORM合格评定、CREE / EDM-SA项目要求及捐助方采购
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——AMANORM合格評定、CREE / EDM-SA項目要求及捐助方採購

summary.en: AMANORM (Agence Malienne de Normalisation et de Promotion de la Qualité) is Mali's national standards body. Mali does not maintain a large independent national standards library; rather, AMANORM adopts international standards — principally IEC standards — as national norms (Normes Maliennes, NM prefix). For solar PV inverters, the applicable safety standards adopted through AMANORM's IEC adoption process are IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). CREE and EDM-SA, when specifying technical requirements for grid-tied projects and issuing generation licences, reference IEC-based safety evidence as the applicable technical framework, consistent with AMANORM's IEC adoption approach. Donor and lender procurement specifications (World Bank, AfDB, EU) for Mali solar projects universally reference IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence as a required conformity document. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the expected format for IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance. Note: AMANORM's published standards catalogue should be verified directly for the current adoption status of specific IEC editions.
summary.zh: AMANORM（马里标准化与质量促进署）是马里国家标准机构。马里没有大量独立的国家标准库；AMANORM采用国际标准——主要是IEC标准——作为国家规范（马里规范，NM前缀）。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，通过AMANORM IEC采用程序适用的安全标准为IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）。CREE和EDM-SA在为并网项目制定技术要求和颁发发电许可证时，将IEC安全证据作为适用技术框架参考，与AMANORM的IEC采用方式一致。马里太阳能项目的捐助方和贷款方采购规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟）普遍将IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据作为必要合格评定文件。来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据是IEC 62109-1/-2合规的预期格式。注：AMANORM发布的标准目录应直接核验以了解特定IEC版本的现行采用状态。
summary.zht: AMANORM（馬里標準化與質量促進署）是馬里國家標準機構。馬里沒有大量獨立的國家標準庫；AMANORM採用國際標準——主要是IEC標準——作為國家規範（馬里規範，NM前綴）。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，通過AMANORM IEC採用程序適用的安全標準為IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）。CREE和EDM-SA在為併網項目制定技術要求和頒發發電許可證時，將IEC安全證據作為適用技術框架參考，與AMANORM的IEC採用方式一致。馬里太陽能項目的捐助方和貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟）普遍將IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據作為必要合格評定文件。來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據是IEC 62109-1/-2合規的預期格式。注：AMANORM發布的標準目錄應直接核驗以了解特定IEC版本的現行採用狀態。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted via AMANORM IEC adoption process as applicable Mali national norm)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard, implicitly applicable)
AMANORM — Agence Malienne de Normalisation et de Promotion de la Qualité (Mali national standards body; IEC adoption authority)
CREE — Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et de l'Eau (generation licence and technical requirements authority; references IEC safety standards)

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for PV grid-connected inverters is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a Chinese domestic recommended national standard (GB/T designation), assessed at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 in several areas but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and does not constitute IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence. AMANORM, CREE, EDM-SA, and donor/lender procurement specifications for Mali solar projects do not accept Chinese GB/T 37408 as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence. Additionally, Chinese safety testing is conducted at Chinese domestic laboratory conditions (ambient 25 °C, humidity as per Chinese standards), which may not reflect Mali Sahel operating conditions (up to 50 °C ambient, high dust, humidity variation).
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏并网逆变器的主要安全标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内推荐性国家标准（GB/T标识）。其在若干方面与IEC 62109-1/-2的安全意图相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不构成IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。马里太阳能项目的AMANORM、CREE、EDM-SA及捐助方/贷款方采购规格均不接受中国GB/T 37408作为IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据的等效依据。此外，中国安全测试在中国国内实验室条件下进行（环境温度25 °C，湿度按中国标准），可能无法反映马里萨赫勒运营条件（环境温度高达50 °C、高沙尘、湿度变化）。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏併網逆變器的主要安全標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內推薦性國家標準（GB/T標識）。其在若干方面與IEC 62109-1/-2的安全意圖相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不構成IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。馬里太陽能項目的AMANORM、CREE、EDM-SA及捐助方/貸款方採購規格均不接受中國GB/T 37408作為IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據的等效依據。此外，中國安全測試在中國國內實驗室條件下進行（環境溫度25 °C，濕度按中國標準），可能無法反映馬里薩赫勒運營條件（環境溫度高達50 °C、高沙塵、濕度變化）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — Chinese domestic standard, not harmonised with IEC 62109)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy AMANORM / CREE / EDM-SA or donor/lender IEC 62109-1/-2 requirements for Mali. Exporters must: (a) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or model family being supplied to Mali; (b) verify that the IEC 62109-1/-2 test scope includes environmental test conditions appropriate for Sahel operating environments — if the test was conducted at 25 °C or 40 °C, obtain and disclose derating curves to at least 50 °C ambient; (c) ensure IEC 62109-2 test evidence covers the specific output power rating, voltage class, and inverter type (string/central/micro) of the product supplied; (d) obtain French-language versions or certified translations of safety certificates and technical data sheets, as Mali's regulatory and procurement environment is francophone. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 cannot be submitted as IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance evidence for AMANORM conformity, CREE licensing documentation, EDM-SA project submission, or donor/lender procurement.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足马里的AMANORM / CREE / EDM-SA或捐助方/贷款方IEC 62109-1/-2要求。出口商须：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至马里的特定逆变器型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；（b）核实IEC 62109-1/-2测试范围是否包含适用于萨赫勒运营环境的环境测试条件——若测试在25 °C或40 °C下进行，须取得并披露至少50 °C环境温度的降额曲线；（c）确保IEC 62109-2测试证据涵盖所供应产品的特定输出功率等级、电压等级和逆变器类型（组串式/集中式/微型）；（d）取得安全证书和技术数据表的法语版本或经认证翻译，因为马里监管和采购环境使用法语。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书不能作为AMANORM合格评定、CREE许可文件、EDM-SA项目提交或捐助方/贷款方采购的IEC 62109-1/-2合规证据提交。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足馬里的AMANORM / CREE / EDM-SA或捐助方/貸款方IEC 62109-1/-2要求。出口商須：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至馬里的特定逆變器型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；（b）核實IEC 62109-1/-2測試範圍是否包含適用於薩赫勒運營環境的環境測試條件——若測試在25 °C或40 °C下進行，須取得並披露至少50 °C環境溫度的降額曲線；（c）確保IEC 62109-2測試證據涵蓋所供應產品的特定輸出功率等級、電壓等級和逆變器類型（組串式/集中式/微型）；（d）取得安全證書和技術數據表的法語版本或經認證翻譯，因為馬里監管和採購環境使用法語。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書不能作為AMANORM合格評定、CREE許可文件、EDM-SA項目提交或捐助方/貸款方採購的IEC 62109-1/-2合規證據提交。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratory is mandatory in practice for CREE/EDM-SA grid-tied project submissions and for donor/lender-financed solar projects in Mali; AMANORM conformity assessment references IEC 62109 as the applicable inverter safety standard; Sahel thermal derating to ≥45 °C ambient is a mandatory practical requirement for any Mali field installation
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law and not accepted as IEC 62109 equivalent by Mali regulators or donors

source.publisher: AMANORM — Agence Malienne de Normalisation et de Promotion de la Qualité

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy AMANORM, CREE, EDM-SA, or donor/lender IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirements for Mali projects. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, covering the specific inverter model and including derating evidence to at least 45 °C ambient for Sahel field conditions. Obtain French-language safety documentation. Verify current AMANORM IEC adoption status, CREE licensing technical requirements, and project-specific lender specifications before committing to a test programme or project supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足马里项目的AMANORM、CREE、EDM-SA或捐助方/贷款方IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。请安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验，涵盖特定逆变器型号，并包含适用于萨赫勒现场条件的至少45 °C环境温度降额证据。取得法语安全文件。在启动测试计划或项目供货前，核实AMANORM现行IEC采用状态、CREE许可技术要求及项目特定贷款方规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足馬里項目的AMANORM、CREE、EDM-SA或捐助方/貸款方IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。請安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗，涵蓋特定逆變器型號，並包含適用於薩赫勒現場條件的至少45 °C環境溫度降額證據。取得法語安全文件。在啟動測試計畫或項目供貨前，核實AMANORM現行IEC採用狀態、CREE許可技術要求及項目特定貸款方規格。
